abilities.description: Until end of turn, each planeswalker you control becomes a 4/4 red Dragon creature and gains flying.

effect.description: Until end of turn, each planeswalker you control becomes a 4/4 red Dragon creature and gains flying.
effect.name: AnimateAll

abilities.description: Create a 4/4 red Dragon creature token with flying.

triggers.description: Whenever a creature attacks you or a planeswalker you control, each Dragon you control deals 1 damage to that creature.
